Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl
from collections import Counter

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('C:/CS/EmailAutomation/all_leads_master.xlsx', read_only=True\)
ws = wb['leads']

rows = list\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, values_only=True\)\)
total = len\(rows\)
has_email = sum\(1 for r in rows if r[9]\)  # email col index 9
statuses = Counter\(r[15] for r in rows\)   # status col index 15
niches = Counter\(r[4] for r in rows\)      # niche col index 4
sources = Counter\(r[13] for r in rows\)    # source col index 13
website_issues = Counter\(r[12] for r in rows if r[12]\)  # website_issue

print\(f'Total rows: {total}'\)
print\(f'Has email: {has_email}'\)
print\(f'No email: {total - has_email}'\)
print\(f'\\nStatuses: {dict\(statuses\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nTop niches: {niches.most_common\(10\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nSources: {dict\(sources\)}'\)
print\(f'\\nWebsite issues: {dict\(website_issues\)}'\)
")

from database import get_db
db = get_db\(\)
top = db.execute\('SELECT id, business_name_clean, email, niche, priority_score FROM leads WHERE email IS NOT NULL ORDER BY priority_score DESC LIMIT 5'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in top: print\(dict\(r\)\)
db.close\(\)
")
